title: Armor UI
description: Shows your armor status using the same values but with better UI
body:
#  Better Armor HUD Experience
---
## Option One
![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c68666412fe7b27b43a47af1207f1c37ff20c75.png)
## Option Two
![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e599a21d06fd6a5d0be8c528868065214274263e.png)
This mod displays the same vanilla armor level, but in a cleaner, clearer, and more modern UI.
No gameplay changes only a better visual representation of your armor status.
---
#  Features:

- **Shows the exact armor value as vanilla**

- **Clean and minimal bottom-screen HUD**

- **Easy to read during combat**

- **Lightweight and performance-friendly**

- **Perfect for players who love simple and elegant UI**

- **Pure visual improvement. Same armor, better display**
